response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive staff-level software engineering experience and a strong background in technical leadership and mentorship. His current role at Naver directly aligns with key technologies like Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflows, which are central to this position, and he has experience with cloud platforms (AWS). However, the resume falls short on the explicit requirement of 8+ years building and shipping production-grade AI solutions, with his dedicated AI experience appearing to be very recent. An interview would be beneficial to clarify the depth and breadth of his AI project involvement.
strengths: Extensive staff-level software engineering experience and technical leadership.
Direct experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflows.
Strong full-stack development background including TypeScript and cloud (AWS).
concerns: Lacks the required 8+ years of experience specifically building production-grade AI solutions.
Limited explicit mention of designing/building AI systems on major cloud platforms for 8+ years.
Absence of explicit experience with building AI evaluation pipelines or observability frameworks.
